negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: physics_096
prompt: The video opens with a clear view of a blue toy car positioned on a cylindrical platform marked with yellow and black diagonal stripes, resembling caution tape. Above the car, a large, metallic hydraulic press descends from above, its surface also striped in yellow and black. The car remains stationary initially but starts to deform under the force. The front end of the car bends downward, followed by the rear, which lifts off the platform. The car's body compresses and flattens, with parts of the roof and hood collapsing inward. The hydraulic press continues to descend, further crushing the car until it is completely flattened against the platform. The background is a plain, light-colored wall, keeping the focus entirely on the action taking place. The camera remains static throughout, capturing the entire sequence without any movement or change in angle.
